title: Fake Detective
description: AI can create very convincing fake news. A good digital detective knows how to spot the clues!
rules: Read the news and find the 2 SUSPICIOUS CLUES that reveal it's fake news.

questions.claim: BREAKING NEWS: Schools closed nationwide tomorrow due to incoming meteorite! The President says so!

options.text: 🗣️ 'The President says so' — doesn't cite real source

questions.explanation: Fake news uses SENSATIONAL tones and cites vague sources. Always ask: where can I verify this? 🔎

questions.claim: A new scientific study proves that eating chocolate every day makes you 200% smarter!

options.text: 🔬 'A new study' — doesn't say which study

questions.explanation: Exaggerated numbers and vague sources ('a new study...') are signs of fake news! 🚩
